chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 342 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For orders on MA No.7298/2022 2. For orders on MA No.10203/2022 3. For hearing of main case. 23-01-2023 Applicant is present in person. Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl.P.G. a/w SIP Basharat Hussain of P.S. Mobina Town. ============= The applicant, who preferred to argue in person, has completely failed to show me any infirmity with the order impugned. He argued that a demand of crores of rupee had been made from him by OGRA as a consequence of respondent no. 3 running a CNG petrol station but simultaneously also expresses his inability to show any notice or demand from OGRA in this regard. Sufficient indulgence has been shown to the applicant because of the fact that he chose not to be represented by a lawyer, however, I find no illegality or infirmity in the well reasoned order dated 09.05.2022 passed by the learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi East. Application is dismissed along with pending applications. JUDGE
